{"steps": [{"title": "Neural Networks", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.0, "lang": "en-US", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Artificial Neural Networks mimic the brain's structure.
They have layers of 'neurons' that process information.", "highlight": ["Artificial Neural Networks", "neurons"], "speech": "Now, let's dive deeper into how we might build these artificial memory systems. We'll look at artificial neural networks, which are inspired by our own brains!", "tts_engine": "android", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 3500, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": [], "svg_elements": []}, {"frame_type": "diagram", "text": "Input -> Hidden Layers -> Output", "highlight": ["Input", "Hidden Layers", "Output"], "speech": "Think of them like a series of connected nodes, or artificial neurons. Information enters through an input layer, gets processed in one or more hidden layers, and then produces an output.", "tts_engine": "gemini", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 4000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": [], "svg_html": "<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,user-scalable=no"><style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#1A2B1A;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;height:100vh}}svg{max-width:100%}</style></head><body><svg viewBox="0 0 400 300" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="50.0" y="100.0" width="50.0" height="30.0" stroke="#F0EDD0" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" fill-opacity="0" rx="4" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="0.00s" fill="freeze"/></rect>
<text x="60.0" y="115.0" font-family="serif" font-size="13" fill="#F5E3A0" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0">Input<animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="0.30s" fill="freeze"/></text>
<line x1="100.0" y1="115.0" x2="150.0" y2="115.0" stroke="#F0EDD0" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="50.00" stroke-dashoffset="50.00"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="50.00" to="0" dur="0.45s" begin="0.58s" fill="freeze"/></line>
<rect x="150.0" y="80.0" width="50.0" height="30.0" stroke="#F0EDD0" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" fill-opacity="0" rx="4" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="0.96s" fill="freeze"/></rect>
<text x="160.0" y="95.0" font-family="serif" font-size="13" fill="#F5E3A0" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0">Hidden<animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="1.26s" fill="freeze"/></text>
<rect x="200.0" y="110.0" width="50.0" height="30.0" stroke="#F0EDD0" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" fill-opacity="0" rx="4" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="1.54s" fill="freeze"/></rect>
<text x="210.0" y="125.0" font-family="serif" font-size="13" fill="#F5E3A0" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0">Layer<animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="1.84s" fill="freeze"/></text>
<line x1="250.0" y1="115.0" x2="300.0" y2="115.0" stroke="#F0EDD0" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="50.00" stroke-dashoffset="50.00"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="50.00" to="0" dur="0.45s" begin="2.12s" fill="freeze"/></line>
<rect x="300.0" y="100.0" width="50.0" height="30.0" stroke="#F0EDD0" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" fill-opacity="0" rx="4" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="2.50s" fill="freeze"/></rect>
<text x="310.0" y="115.0" font-family="serif" font-size="13" fill="#F5E3A0" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0">Output<animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="2.80s" fill="freeze"/></text></svg></body></html>"}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Learning involves adjusting connection strengths.
This allows networks to 'learn' patterns from data.", "highlight": ["adjusting connection strengths", "learn patterns"], "speech": "The magic happens when these connections between neurons are adjusted. This process is how the network learns to recognize patterns, like identifying a picture of a cat or understanding spoken words.", "tts_engine": "gemini", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 3500, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": [], "svg_elements": []}, {"frame_type": "quiz_mcq", "text": "What is the primary way artificial neural networks learn?", "highlight": ["primary way", "learn"], "speech": "Let's check your understanding! What is the primary way artificial neural networks learn?", "tts_engine": "android", "voice_role": "quiz", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": ["By increasing the number of layers", "By adjusting connection strengths", "By using more input data only", "By randomly changing neuron colors"], "quiz_correct_index": 1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": [], "svg_elements": []}]}, {"title": "Data Storage & BCI", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.65, "image_description": "Brain-computer interface (schematic).jpg", "lang": "en-US", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Artificial memory needs efficient data storage.
Think of it like a super-advanced hard drive.", "highlight": ["data storage", "super-advanced hard drive"], "speech": "So, if we create these artificial memory systems, where do we store all that information? We need ways to store and retrieve data very, very efficiently, much like a super-advanced computer hard drive.", "tts_engine": "gemini", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 3500, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": [], "svg_elements": []}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCI) connect brains to devices.
This allows direct communication.", "highlight": ["Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCI)", "direct communication"], "speech": "Now, imagine connecting these artificial memories, or even our own brains, to computers. That's where Brain-Computer Interfaces, or BCIs, come in. They act as a bridge, allowing direct communication between the brain and external devices.", "tts_engine": "gemini", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 4000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": [], "svg_elements": []}, {"frame_type": "quiz_typed", "text": "What does BCI stand for and what is its main purpose?", "highlight": ["BCI", "main purpose"], "speech": "Let's try a typed answer for this one. What does BCI stand for, and what is its main purpose in the context of connecting brains and devices?", "tts_engine": "android", "voice_role": "quiz", "duration_ms": 4000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "BCI stands for Brain-Computer Interface, and its main purpose is to allow direct communication between the brain and external devices.", "quiz_keywords": ["Brain-Computer Interface", "direct communication", "bridge", "devices"], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": [], "svg_elements": []}, {"frame_type": "summary", "text": "* Artificial neural networks mimic brain structure.
* They learn by adjusting connection strengths.
* Efficient data storage is crucial for artificial memory.
* BCIs enable direct brain-device communication.", "highlight": [], "speech": "To sum up our entire lesson: We explored the idea of creating new memory brains, understood how our own brains work with neurons, touched on bioengineering, and then delved into artificial neural networks for data storage and the exciting possibilities of brain-computer interfaces.", "tts_engine": "google", "voice_role": "assistant", "duration_ms": 5000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": [], "svg_elements": []}]}]}
